rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows '1830' as a distinct, first line. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with subsequent header lines.

rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris S. L. Richards
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows this as a distinct, second header line. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with other header lines.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows this as a distinct header line. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with other header lines.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows this as a distinct header line. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with other header lines.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows this as a distinct, underlined header line. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with the 'Money rents fixed' line.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows this as a distinct, underlined sub-section header. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with the previous header line.

Selected gemini-flash. Description is clearly 'Gwinces Rectory 1 qr' and the amount is '60', correctly interpreted as 6 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku had an incorrect description but matched the amount.

Selected gemini-flash. Description is clearly 'Kidlington Do 1/2 yr' and the amount is '10', correctly interpreted as 10 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku had an incorrect description but matched the amount.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows description as 'Do Capons & Braun 1/2 yr' and amount as '1 / 7 / 6'. claude-haiku misidentified the description and extracted an incorrect amount.

Visual override. Both extractors misread the amount. The image clearly shows '9' in the pounds column, '6' in shillings, and '8' in pence. gemini-flash read 9 shillings and 6 pence, claude-haiku also read 9 shillings and 6 pence, both missing the pounds and misassigning the shillings and pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Dunnithorne 1 yr' and '6 / 13 / 4'. claude-haiku correctly flagged its own error due to invalid pence (13d) but misaligned the columns.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Pickford 1 yr' and '1 / 13 / 4'. claude-haiku correctly flagged its own error due to invalid pence (13d) but misaligned the columns.

Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Medenham 1 yr' and '6 / 13 / 4'. claude-haiku correctly flagged its own error due to invalid pence (13d) and noted systematic misalignment, but the amounts were still misread.

Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Little Tew Becks 1yr & 1/2' and '1 / 19 / 1 1/2'. claude-haiku correctly identified its own critical error due to invalid pence (19d) and fundamental misalignment.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Symonds 3 qrs' and '7 / 6'. claude-haiku misidentified the description and misread the shillings amount.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Lennard 3 qrs' with a dash in the amount columns, indicating no amount. claude-haiku incorrectly extracted '7' shillings.
Selected gemini-flash. Both extractors agreed on the amount of '10 shillings, 0 pence'. gemini-flash had a slightly more accurate description ('1 qr' vs '1yr').
Consensus between gemini-flash and claude-haiku. Clearly a header with no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification against column lines shows the amount is '1' in the pounds column, '2' in the shillings column, and '9' in the pence column. claude-haiku misread '11' as shillings and missed the '9' in pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Both extractors agreed on the amount '2 shillings, 8 pence'. gemini-flash had a more accurate description ('L.' instead of '£') and noted the slightly elevated pence digit.
Selected gemini-flash. Both extractors agreed on the amount '4 shillings, 4 pence'. gemini-flash had a more accurate description ('Do' instead of 'Mo').

Description taken from gemini-flash ('Yarnton' and '1 qr' are more accurate). Amount taken from claude-haiku, which correctly identified '11' in the shillings column. gemini-flash misread '11' as '1' and '4' for pence.
Consensus between gemini-flash and claude-haiku. Clearly a header with no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows '84' in pounds, '0' in shillings, and '6' in pence. claude-haiku correctly identified its own major misalignment leading to invalid shillings.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows '34' in pounds, '8' in shillings, and '4' in pence. claude-haiku correctly identified its own error due to invalid shillings.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows '107' in pounds, '14' in shillings, and '3' in pence. claude-haiku correctly identified its own critical errors due to invalid shillings and pence.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows '181' in pounds, '19' in shillings, and '9' in pence. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this row with the next and identified critical errors.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows 'Do Tenements 1/4 yr' and '2 / 14 / 8 1/4'. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this row with the previous.

Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows description as 'Merton Rectory (Land Tax deducted) 1/4 yr' and '239 / 7 / 5 1/4'. claude-haiku correctly identified its own critical confidence failure due to poor legibility and misalignment but missed the full amount.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows description and '2 / 10 / 10 1/2'. claude-haiku had a corrupted description and missed the pounds value and correctly extracting the fraction.
Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows description '------ Penny Do Do' and '15 / 13 / 3 3/4'. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this row with the previous.

Selected gemini-flash. Image clearly shows the total as '£ 834 / 7 / 3/4'. The pounds '834' and shillings '7' are clear, with '3/4' as a pence fraction and no whole pence digit. claude-haiku missed the shillings and pence entirely.
